visuals.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle class="spinner-arc" cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#22d3ee" stroke-width="10" stroke-dasharray="180 72" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

customCode.css: .spinner-arc { transform-box: fill-box; transform-origin: center; animation: spin 1.5s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

.badge { color: #ffffff; font-size: 72px; padding: 20px 40px; background: #e11d48; border-radius: 16px; animation: pulse 1s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.18); } }

customCode.js: document.querySelector('.price').animate([{ transform: 'translateY(0)' }, { transform: 'translateY(-30px)' }, { transform: 'translateY(0)' }], { duration: 800, iterations: Infinity, easing: 'ease-in-out' });
